evals.prompt: Create a project skill that generates PHPDoc from selected PHP methods. We use NextStage harness — save it where our other skills live.
evals.expected_output: Agent loads upstream skill-creator workflow, drafts .agents/skills/phpdoc-generator/SKILL.md, creates evals/evals.json, runs npx @nextstage-brasil/harness sync, reports sync success.

evals.prompt: Our custom deploy-checklist skill isn't triggering well. Improve the description and re-run a quick eval — this is our app repo with .nextstage-harness installed.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses skill-creator-workspace/ for iteration, edits .agents/skills/deploy-checklist/SKILL.md, offers description optimization; runs harness sync if adapters need refresh.

evals.prompt: Add eval prompts for the api-mock-helper skill we already have under .agents/skills/.
evals.expected_output: Agent writes .agents/skills/api-mock-helper/evals/evals.json with 2–3 realistic prompts; no catalog.json changes; optional harness sync.
